modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble scheduling a TeamDynamix ticket.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to set up a ticket in TeamDynamix. Just wanted to get it scheduled, you know? But something went wrong. It’s a bit frustrating when things don’t go as planned.
description: So, I was trying to set up a ticket in TeamDynamix. Just wanted to get it scheduled, you know? But something went wrong. It’s a bit frustrating when things don’t go as planned.
